nodes.name: MarketplacePackageCreator
nodes.description: Create marketplace package with content-addressable storage (SHA-256 hash, DD-326). Sanitizes logic/data plane separation.

nodes.name: PackageVersionManager
nodes.description: Manage package versions with immutability. Forced security patches create new versions (DD-325, DD-328).

nodes.name: PackageAccessController
nodes.description: Control access to packages via RBAC. Enforce public/private/organization-scoped visibility rules.

nodes.name: PackageMetadataIndexer
nodes.description: Index package metadata for search and discovery. Emit IndexedPackageCreated event.

nodes.name: PackageLicenseValidator
nodes.description: Validate license compatibility and open-source compliance. Score package for legal risk.

nodes.name: PackageIntegrityVerifier
nodes.description: Verify package contents match SHA-256 hash. Detect tampering and bitrot. Supply-chain security (CF-715).

nodes.name: PublicationReadinessGate
nodes.description: Validate all package metadata, versions, access controls, and license checks complete. Emit PackageReadyForPublication.

nodes.name: OutboxPublisher
nodes.description: Emit CloudEvents to queue fabric after all storage (DNA-8 outbox pattern). Secret-ref indirection for sensitive metadata (CF-726).
